patch.value: Prune src/cli/commands/index.ts barrel dead re-exports and adopt knip as a dead-export gate

2026-07-04 code-quality sweep: the commands barrel re-exports ~60 runtime symbols + ~80 types that no consumer imports via the barrel (package.json exports never exposes it; only ., ./sdk*, ./cli). knip reports 115 unused exports + 239 unused exported types repo-wide (SDK public surface needs an ignore-list). One-time sweep confirmed+fixed 2026-07-04: 57 dead loader.ts imports, 7 dead export keywords (calendar/list/http-client/fix-planning/doctor). Adopt knip (or ts-prune) with an SDK allowlist as a CI gate so the class stays extinct.
